feedback.text: I would like to express my support of adjusting the act to cover the issues of payment processors using their monopolistic power to encroach on consumer rights, that has been brought to light by them forcing distribution platforms like Steam to stop offering certain products and the issues of digital ownership that had been brought up in the EU initiative Stop destroying video games that has acquired 1,440,937 signatures. I believe these issues need to be addressed as soon as possible since these actors disrupt the free market and freedom of expression
